_comment: GOAT Squad FOOTBALL config — everything game-specific for goatsquad-football.html (the goatsquad-baseball.html engine with a gridiron slot layout + a football series sim). Data comes from squadfoot-nfl.json (bake with `node fetch-squadfoot.js` — it also verifies + patches img onto the gauntlet rosters and coaches below via ESPN/Wikidata, wrong faces impossible). Slots carry x/y (percent) coords; the head coach works the sideline. Slot coords deliberately reuse the baseball layout's proven collision-free grid.
tagline: Stop the spin. Field your eleven. Beat the boss.

adapter._comment: img on every player is a FULL URL (EA Madden portrait for the pool, ESPN/Wikipedia for retired greats) — imageTemplate '{id}' passes it straight through. canvasImageProxies (list — three image origins) keeps the share-card canvas exportable; each entry maps to a same-origin vercel.json rewrite.

rarity._comment: Madden pool histogram is MLB-shaped (deep 65-74 middle: 758 of 1,496). Bands boosted 2026-07-21 (Matt: odds felt tight) — 80+ pulls now land ~33% of stops vs ~27% at launch, lifting typical squads ~+1 OVR and gauntlet completion toward the ~5% NBA target. legendMult 0.2 keeps purple pulls rare; legendPity forces one after 18 legend-free stops (gauntlet only).

ability.desc: The 46 defense owns the 4th quarter: Bears +10% on the final roll.
They've seen your walkthrough tape. Patriots +15% to lead at the half.
Perfect teams don't blink. Your halftime-comeback boost is switched off.
They came back from 28–3. Patriots +25% when trailing at the half.

bosses.name: 1989 49ers
bosses.blurb: Montana to Rice, on a loop.

bosses.name: 2013 Seahawks
bosses.blurb: The Legion of Boom eats quarterbacks.

bosses.name: 1986 Giants
bosses.blurb: LT hunts whoever you start at QB.

bosses.name: 1998 Broncos
bosses.blurb: Elway rides off with the hardware.

bosses.name: 2000 Ravens
bosses.blurb: Ten points a game. That's all you get.

ability.desc: That defense shortens the game. Your squad plays at -1 overall.

bosses.name: 2017 Eagles
bosses.blurb: They will run the Philly Special.

gauntlet._comment: Same shape as the NBA/MLB gauntlets: one squad, one life, layered map with forks + traveling shops. Each team's `players` are that season's roster for the victory-spoils wheel, rated as they were THAT year (Shannon Sharpe is an 84 on the '00 Ravens and an 88 on the '98 Broncos). img is patched by fetch-squadfoot.js (ESPN identity-verified, Wikipedia portrait fallback).
gauntlet.title: THE GAUNTLET
gauntlet.subtitle: One squad. One life. Beat them, sign their stars, spend your winnings.

economy._comment: gameWin pays per QUARTER you win, seriesWin is the game-win bonus, sweep = win every non-tied quarter, upset unchanged. Retuned for the one-game format so a typical fight still banks ~US$35-40.

items.name: Insurance Policy
items.desc: When a loss would end your run, time rewinds to halftime and the second half re-flips. One use.

items.name: Training Camp
items.desc: +2 OVR to one player. Max +4 per player.

items.name: Prime Boost
items.desc: One player finds his PRIME form: +4 OVR. Once per player.

items.name: Free-Agent Wheel
items.desc: Spin the whole league — your agent skews it toward stars. Sign who you freeze, somebody gets cut.

items.name: Relic Wheel
items.desc: Every card on the wheel is a relic — spoils-wheel odds, minus what you own. One STOP.

items.name: Second-Stop Token
items.desc: Your next victory wheel: STOP twice, keep the better freeze.

items.name: Coaching Carousel
items.desc: Respin your coach slot. Could be Lombardi. Could be the Mascot.

items.name: Home Field Deed
items.desc: Home field the rest of the run — every playoff game is played in YOUR stadium, with an edge.

items.name: Draft Workout
items.desc: Spin the raw-prospect wheel. Rough now — but he gains +1 for EVERY game you win.

gauntlet._mods_comment: 🃏 Run modifiers — a fresh Gauntlet offers 3 of these (plus Standard Issue). Behavior is keyed by id in the page (modReelFilter/applyMod/etc); this file is just the wording.

mods.name: No Ghosts
mods.desc: Legends never appear on your reels this run. Start with +$40.

mods.name: Bench Mob
mods.desc: Your FLEX gets +6 after the draft. Every boss +1.

mods.name: Head Start
mods.desc: Start with a random economy relic. Shop prices +30% all run.

mods.name: Iron Eleven
mods.desc: No mulligan this run. +$60 up front.

mods.name: Underdogs
mods.desc: Your reels max out at 84 overall. All winnings +50%.

relics.name: The Ring
relics.desc: Been there before — +6% on the final roll of every game.

relics.name: Rabbit's Foot
relics.desc: Momentum never swings against you.

relics.name: The Spark Plug
relics.desc: Instant offense off the bench — +2% win chance in every game.

relics.name: Sponsor Deal
relics.desc: +$3 for every game you win.

relics.name: Platinum Card
relics.desc: Interest cap raised by $10.

relics.name: Season Tickets
relics.desc: Shop prices 25% off.

relics.name: Hype Man
relics.desc: Upset bonuses pay triple.

relics.name: Locker-Room Chemistry
relics.desc: Squad overall +2 in every series.

relics.name: Fast Starters
relics.desc: +15% to lead at the half.

relics.name: Draft & Develop
relics.desc: +4 squad overall — homegrown only: you can never sign a spoils player again.

relics.name: Prove-It Deal
relics.desc: +3 squad overall. Game wins pay $0 — the big bonuses still count.

relics.name: Piggy Bank
relics.desc: +$4 every city you land in. Shatters forever the first time you buy from a shop.

relics.name: Dynasty
relics.desc: +1 squad overall for every fight won while holding it.

relics.name: The Egg
relics.desc: Does nothing… hatches into a random chase relic after 3 wins.

relics.name: Bandwagon
relics.desc: Wins pay a bonus that grows: $3, then $6, then $9…

relics.name: One-Year Rental
relics.desc: +5 squad overall. After every win there's a 25% chance he walks in free agency.

relics.name: Mood Swings
relics.desc: Comes out ON FIRE: +8% to lead at half — then −3% down the stretch.

relics.name: Deep Pockets
relics.desc: +1% win chance per $25 you're holding at kickoff (max +4%).

relics.name: The Copycat
relics.desc: Mirrors the newest of your other relics.

relics.name: Advance Scout
relics.desc: Victory spoils also deal one player scouted off the NEXT team on your schedule.

teams._rotation_comment: ↓ 2026-07-22 rotation-pool era teams — never in the config layers; ensureLadder() swaps them into band-matched early/mid slots per run. Era-rated like everything else.

lions08.name: 2008 Lions
lions08.blurb: 0–16. At least Megatron showed up every Sunday.

broncos11.name: 2011 Broncos
broncos11.blurb: Tebow Time. Don't ask how — it just kept working.

cardinals08.name: 2008 Cardinals
cardinals08.blurb: Larry Legend and one furious February run.

packers96.name: 1996 Packers
packers96.blurb: Favre at full gunslinger, Reggie in the trenches.

steelers75.name: 1975 Steelers
steelers75.blurb: The Steel Curtain doesn't move for anybody.

rams99.name: 1999 Rams
rams99.blurb: The Greatest Show on Turf hangs 30 before halftime.

bucs76.name: 1976 Buccaneers
bucs76.blurb: 0–14. The only winless team anyone remembers. A warm-up.

patriots01.name: 2001 Patriots
patriots01.blurb: A 6th-round pick takes over at QB. Nobody saw it coming.

ravens00.name: 2000 Ravens
ravens00.blurb: Ten points a game allowed. That's all you get.

ability.desc: That defense shortens the game. Your squad plays at -1 overall.

broncos98.name: 1998 Broncos
broncos98.blurb: Elway rides off with back-to-back rings.

ability.desc: Perfect teams don't blink. Your halftime-comeback boost is switched off.

seahawks13.name: 2013 Seahawks
seahawks13.blurb: The Legion of Boom eats quarterbacks.

niners89.name: 1989 49ers
niners89.blurb: Montana to Rice, on a loop.

patriots07.name: 2007 Patriots
patriots07.blurb: 16–0 in the regular season. Fifty touchdowns.

ability.desc: They've seen your walkthrough tape. Patriots +15% to lead at the half.
The 46 defense owns the 4th quarter: Bears +10% on the final roll.

rental._comment: 🪪 Rent-A-Ring-Chaser — knocks at HALFTIME (gauntlet, once per fight): pay price and a hired gun rated ≥ minRating suits up for the second half, replacing your weakest eligible slot. The first half stands; the second half re-flips with him on the field. Gone after the final gun, win or lose.

bossSim._comment: ONE-GAME PLAYOFF odds: two acts — halfSlope drives who leads at half, finalSlope who wins. halfCarry = the value of holding the halftime lead; momentum = the desperation claw-back for whoever trails (a Brady squad chases with heroBoost instead and pierces the cap). Tuned 2026-07-21: even matchup 50%, +6 favorite ~90%, ladder clear ~3%.

scorigami._comment: every winner-loser final that has occurred in real NFL history — a sim final missing from this list is a SCORIGAMI. Refreshed by fetch-squadfoot.js from nflscorigami.com/data.
